About Us

Our Second Home
That You'll Always Cherish

Woodstone Homestay embodies the philosophy of luxurious simplicity selected teak wood combined with local natural stone creates a warm, authentic atmosphere. Tucked away among the green hills, we offer more than just a place to stay.

Every detail is designed to provide peace of mind and closeness to nature, while still enjoying unparalleled modern comforts.

  • High-speed WiFi
  • Private parking area
  • Family friendly

FAQ

Ya, kami menyediakan area parkir gratis yang cukup luas untuk kendaraan roda dua maupun roda empat selama masa menginap.
Early check-in dapat kami akomodasi tergantung ketersediaan kamar. Silakan hubungi kami melalui WhatsApp minimal 1 hari sebelum kedatangan.
Saat ini sarapan belum termasuk dalam paket menginap, namun tersedia beberapa pilihan tempat makan yang mudah dijangkau di sekitar Woodstone.
